title: Ilimardon

'''Ilimardon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Nicandra sector/Legends|Nicandra sector]]. It was governed by the [[Regal Hierarchy]], which maintained a wildlife division and a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. When the Regal Hierarchy became interested in the use of [[domesticated mynock]]s as weapons against starships, it employed the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gres Ople]], former [[Mynock/Legends|mynock]] trainer of the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Chorssk]]'s [[Chorssk's organization|organization]], to train a new flock of the [[Species/Legends|creatures]]. By [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Ilimardon was a member of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Description==
Ilimardon was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Wizards" /> located in the [[Ilimardon system/Legends|Ilimardon system]], a part of the [[Nicandra sector/Legends|Nicandra sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated on a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that connected it to the [[Nicandra system/Legends|Nicandra system]] as well as the [[Korvaii system/Legends|Korvaii system]] in the [[Kordu sector/Legends|Kordu sector]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==History==
[[File:Mynock_NEGAS.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The Ilimardon government was interested in the use of domesticated mynocks as weapons against starships.]]
At some point, the planetary government of Ilimardon, the [[Regal Hierarchy]], became interested in utilizing [[domesticated mynock]]s as weapons against [[Starship/Legends|starships]], as practiced by the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Chorssk]]. To obtain its own flock of domesticated [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]], the Ilimardon government persuaded the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gres Ople]], a mynock trainer in Chorssk's [[Chorssk's organization|pirate organization]], to instead become an employee in the wildlife division of the Regal Hierarchy. Ople subsequently raised a flock of mynocks from a [[Reproduction/Legends|breeding]] pair she had [[Thief/Legends|stolen]] from Chorssk.<ref name="Wizards" />

Six [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after Ople's defection, Chorssk had sworn to [[Hunting/Legends|hunt]] down and [[Death/Legends|kill]] his former trainer and was willing to go up against all the starships in the Ilimardon [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in order to get to her.<ref name="Wizards" /> By [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Ilimardon fell within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Inhabitants==
Ilimardon was governed by the Regal Hierarchy, which maintained a fleet of starships and a wildlife division. At one point, the Human female Greps Ople was employed in the Hierarchy's wildlife division as a trainer of domesticated mynocks.<ref name="Wizards" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ilimardon was introduced in "Domesticated Mynocks," an article written by [[Jeff Quick]] and published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[April 25]], [[2002]].<ref name="Wizards" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ilimardon [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Ilimardon, in grid square L-7.<ref name="TEA" />
